allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add diagonal stripe visualization and compose Contrapunctus XV

Visualization: fuzzy/untagged notes now render with diagonal stripes
where stripe density encodes similarity score \(100% = solid, 0% = white\).
Lane backgrounds also use stripes when a fuzzy note is active.

Contrapunctus XV: an original 4-voice fugue \(80 measures, 710 notes\)
on the Art of the Fugue subject. Features subject+inversion entering
simultaneously, stretto tightening from 2-bar to 1-beat spacing, and
subject in augmentation in the bass finale. 18 subject entries detected
by the theme pipeline \(32% of notes directly tagged as thematic\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
